name: Austin Credit Repair - Credit Counseling Services
description_short: Austin Credit Repair - Credit Counseling Services is a credit repair provider based in Austin, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 with 15 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Austin Credit Repair - Credit Counseling Services is a credit repair provider serving clients in Austin, Texas. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 15 reviews, Austin Credit Repair - Credit Counseling Services has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Austin area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Austin Credit Repair - Credit Counseling Services specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Austin, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Austin Credit Repair - Credit Counseling Services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Austin, Texas area who are considering Austin Credit Repair - Credit Counseling Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
